prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Trim, cabinets, flooring, part of the Carpentry & Finishes scope. The observed field condition is: tile on single-layer subfloor deflection. The work is in service as an operating asset. Reference material on hand: mfr instructions, TCNA.
title: Fault diagnosis: Trim, cabinets, flooring (residential job)
